staticText: Side-income tax reserve worksheet contract. Every jurisdiction, tax period, amount, reserve rate, credit and evidence label is entered by the user. The engine only calculates planning profit, a reserve before and after user-entered credits, cash remaining and equal planning instalments. It supplies no country rates, brackets, reliefs, thresholds, regimes, due dates, platform defaults, deduction eligibility, tax advice or final liability. No AI prefill exists and no financial input is sent to AI.
